name: Potato-Mushroom Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté garlic, mushrooms, and scallions in oil for about 5 minutes until the vegetables are limp.
2. Pulse cashews in a blender or food processor until they form a coarse meal.
3. Combine the mushroom mixture and ground cashews with mashed potatoes, grated carrots, ginger, salt, and pepper in a large bowl. Add bread crumbs and mix well. The mixture will be soft and moist.
4. On a baking sheet or work surface, shape 8 to 10 patties using sesame seeds as a guide.
5. Using a large spoon, scoop out the vegetable mixture and form 8 to 10 patties. Place them on the sesame seed beds.
6. Flip each patty to coat both sides generously with sesame seeds.
7. Gently transfer the patties to a well-oiled grill or skillet and cook for 3 to 4 minutes on each side until medium brown.
8. Makes 8 to 10 patties. Variation: Saute burgers in olive oil until golden brown. Per Patty: 138 cal; 3 g protein, 6 g fat, 17 g carb; 0 chol; 155 mg sod; 2 g fiber
